tasks.label: backend: stop port 8080
args: $lines = netstat -ano -p tcp | Select-String '^\s*TCP\s+\S+:8080\s+\S+\s+LISTENING\s+(\d+)\s*$'; $pids = @($lines | ForEach-Object { [int]$_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique); if ($pids.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No listener on port 8080.'; exit 0 }; foreach ($pidValue in $pids) { Write-Host "Stopping process $pidValue listening on port 8080"; Stop-Process -Id $pidValue -Force -ErrorAction Stop }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

tasks.label: backend: go run
tasks.command: $env:AIP_DATA_FOLDER='${workspaceFolder}\data'; $env:AIP_FEEDBACK_JSONL_PATH='${workspaceFolder}\data\feedback.local.jsonl'; $env:AIP_ACCESS_LOG_PATH='${workspaceFolder}\cmd\aip_food_lookup\output\access.log'; $env:AIP_ERROR_LOG_PATH='${workspaceFolder}\cmd\aip_food_lookup\output\errors.log'; $slackConfigured = -not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($env:AIP_SLACK_FEEDBACK_WEBHOOK_URL) -or -not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($env:AIP__API__SlackFeedbackWebhookUrl); try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8080/ | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Backend ready on http://127.0.0.1:8080'; Write-Host 'Using existing backend process. Stop that process if you need a fresh backend.'; while ($true) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3600 } } catch { Write-Host 'Backend starting on http://127.0.0.1:8080'; Write-Host ('AIP_DATA_FOLDER=' + $env:AIP_DATA_FOLDER); Write-Host ('AIP_FEEDBACK_JSONL_PATH=' + $env:AIP_FEEDBACK_JSONL_PATH); if ($slackConfigured) { Write-Host 'Slack feedback enabled for local backend.' } else { Write-Host 'Slack feedback disabled for local backend.' }; go run . }

tasks.label: backend: wait for ready
args: $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds(30); do { try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8080/ | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Backend responded on http://127.0.0.1:8080'; exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); Write-Error 'Backend did not become ready on http://127.0.0.1:8080 within 30 seconds. Check whether port 8080 is blocked or another process is failing to start.'; exit 1

tasks.label: frontend: wait for ready
args: $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds(30); do { try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:5173/ | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Frontend responded on http://127.0.0.1:5173'; exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } } while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline); Write-Error 'Frontend did not become ready on http://127.0.0.1:5173 within 30 seconds.'; exit 1

tasks.label: local: prepare web launch running API
